inputs.prompt: @Image1 is the FIRST FRAME — a six-panel hand-drawn storyboard page of a bearded smith (Hephaestus) and a long assembly line of gold humanoid automata in a cavernous blue-lit workshop. Pin it exactly as the opening frame. A painterly concept-art world: cool electric blue and deep violet shadow against warm gold automata and orange spark-light, cinematic industrial gloom, soft volumetric haze. The seams of the drawing are visible; nothing is smooth or over-rendered. Slow push in on the page; the panels breathe and come alive. Within the frames the scene begins to move — Hephaestus leans his weight in and works, his hands and an overhead robotic welding arm throwing sparks against a gold automaton's chest; sparks scatter and fall and tick out on the floor; the long row of gold figures recedes into the blue dark as faint steam drifts between them; the robotic arms pivot and lower with mechanical weight. Patient, monumental, the banked heat of a forge. Low mechanical hum, the hiss and crack of the welder, sparks ticking on metal.
